reviews.review_description: Me and my friends when we first found this game we had SO much fun. We played it until we found every area in the entire game and it's just a blast all together, but it's really sad that it has not updated since I found it early 2024 because this game had A LOTTTT of potential if they just added new areas and entities.
Never have I ever seen a gorilla tag fan game that was just like this we need a community out of this game it’s really good and if you like memes then this game is good for you😁👍
Dude, I made a video with one of my friends and dude, he was so scared I was screaming well we were screaming 😂😂
I like this game a lot but there no type of videos of the game or anyone online it’s still a god level game
